title: Verify correct events trigger when user interacts with Trial Corner
description: Test that analytics events fire correctly for all user interactions in Trial Corner

steps.description: 1. View Trial Corner widget - check event fired
2. Click Trial Corner widget - check event fired
3. View Trial Corner page - check event fired
4. Click Remind Me toggle - check event fired
5. Click Pause button - check event fired
6. Click Cancel button - check event fired

expected_result: Events fire with correct attributes: trial-corner-widget-viewed, trial-corner-widget-clicked, trial-corner-viewed, remind-me-clicked, pause-clicked, cancel-clicked with correct page source attributes
